title: Remote Control Helicopter for Kids,Altitude Hold RC Helicopters with Gyro LED Light,2.4GHz Radio Controlled Aircraft Indoor Toy with 3.5 Channel,High&Low Speed,Gift for Boys Beginner
features: 🚁【EASY TO CONTROL RC HELICOPTER】Fly easy with 1-Key Lift/Land and Trim Control to correct drifting and tilting; the RC helicopter hovering at a certain height automatically after taking off/landing, and there is flying demo, it is easy to operate for kids and beginer

🚁【2.4GHZ & FULL 3.5 CHANNEL HELICOPTER TOY】 Up, Down, Left, Right, Forward and Backward built-in Gyro to hover in the air. 3pcs AAA batteries is required for the transmitter (Not included). It can fly 13-15 minutes after charging for about 45 minutes. 2.4GHZ Frequencies let you Fly up to Multiple helicopters at the same time will not be troubled（New version 2.4GHz technology for interference-free connection）

🚁【LIGHT-WEIGHT DURABLE & ANTI-COLLISIONT】This creative 2.4G induction RC helicopter is made of light-weight and super hard material. Super crash resistant during the flight. It can fly at 2 speeds, high and low, and is equipped with bright and colorful LED lights so you won't get lost when flying in the dark. The control range is about 45-50 meters. Amazing Technology in the palm of your hand, and for more flying games fun

🚁【EXPERIENCE GREAT DURABILITY】Equipped with the newest modular battery, you can enjoy the fun of flying for about 15 mins a time with this mini helicopter. The rechargeable batteries are built with cutting-edge charging safety against over-charge,over-current,and low voltage scenarios. Simply control it from any angle or location inside your home without worrying about losing signal. The USB cable provides more convenience for charging. Great flying toy for kids and kids at heart

🚁【PERFECT FLYING PERFORMANCE】With blue LED lights makes it easy to fly in the dark. Amazing Technology in the palm of your hand! TERRAMUS RC Helicopter all passed several test with certificates: FCC, CE, ROHS, EN71, EN62115, EN60825, R&TTE, PAHS, HR4040, 7P, ASTM. Compatible with US UK and EU standard. If you have any question, please feel free to contact us
description: Product Description TERRAMUS RC Helicopter, Remote Control Helicopter with Gyro and LED Light Indoor Micro RC Helicopter Best Helicopter Toy Gift Easy to control: Fly easy with 1-Key Lift/Land and Trim Control to correct drifting and tilting and Built-in great Gyro technology and equipped with tail rotor motor, which is used to stabilize the helicopter's heading, leads to great performance in stablize the direction. With LED Light & Flashing Light: With multicolored LED lights make the rc helicopter easy to fly in the dark. Amazing Technology in the palm of your hand! RC Helicopter, No Assembly required, Ready To Fly! Soft Rotor Blade: Soft blade ensure flying safety. When the blade is stuck, it will power off automatically to protect itself and the controller. Which is suitable for kids and beginners. Wider Fighter Range & Long Flying Time: The remote control helicopter equipped with high capability battery, its flying time is around 13-15 minutes. 2.4GHZ & FULL 3.5 CHANNEL Fly easy with 1-Key Lift/Land and Trim Control to correct drifting and tilting; the RC helicopter hovering at a certain height automatically after taking off/landing, and there is flying demo, it is easy to operate for kids and beginer LIGHT-WEIGHT DURABLE & ANTI-COLLISIONT This creative 2.4G induction RC helicopter is made of light-weight and super hard material. Super crash resistant during the flight. It can fly at 2 speeds, high and low, and is equipped with bright and colorful LED lights so you won't get lost when flying in the dark EXPERIENCE GREAT DURABILITY With blue LED lights makes it easy to fly in the dark. Amazing Technology in the palm of your hand! TERRAMUS RC Helicopter all passed several test with certificates: FCC, CE, ROHS, EN71, EN62115, EN60825, R&TTE, PAHS, HR4040, 7P, ASTM. Compatible with US UK and EU standard. PERFECT FLYING PERFORMANCE Built-in NEWEST Gyro technology and equipped with tail rotor motor, which is used to stabilize the helicopter's heading, leads to great performance in stablize the direction. EASY TO CHARGE The high-capacity lithium polymer battery is not removable, please connect directly to the TYPE-C charging cable and then connect it to the USB port. The USB light turns red when charging and turns off when fully charged. FUN FOR ALL AGES & OOCCASION This model is an ideal recreational toy for beginners, advanced and professionals. It’s easy to figure out even with so many functions. Both children and adults will love it for sure Great Helicopter Toy for Beginners and Kids Ready to fly design makes it as a good choice for kids and beginners. Just enjoy the fun of playing with TERRAMUS rc helicopter. One Key Take Off: The helicopter will hover at certain altitude automatically after taking off. One Key Landing: The helicopter will fly down slowly and land on the ground automatically before the motors stopping. When it crashes or is laying down or upside down or whatever, you can just control the throttle and the rudder, it will be back up and take off into the air again. You don't need to go grab it and turn it over. What's in the Box? 1 x RC Mini Helicopter with Battery 1 x Transmitter 1 x USB Charging Cable 2 x Replace Blades(A &B) 1 x Instruction Manual 1 x Screw driver
